acholi.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: ray diagrams, Snell's law, mirrors, lenses, interference, diffraction, polarization. Sims side-by-side + calculators.
acholi.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Rainbows · mirages · after-images · color · polarized sky
acholi.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: Optical scientists 50+ nia con o kombedi
acholi.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Trivia · records · quotes · safety · data · teaching tips
acholi.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Concept progress + lapeny mene ma ityeko
acholi.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Snell's law sandbox — tam TIR + dispersion
acholi.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Refraction — Snell's law + total internal reflection
acholi.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenses — converging + diverging, thin lens equation
acholi.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Angle okato critical angle. Pe tye light ma kato — ducu dwogo cen. Man aye guti me fiber optics, ryeny me diamond, prism periscopes.
acholi.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Nyiko cok ki TIR boundary. Refracted ray woto cok ki surface; transmitted intensity dwoko piny.
acholi.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Light donyo i denser medium (n₁ < n₂). Refracted ray gol I NGET ki normal — light mot i dense medium.
acholi.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Light donyo i less-dense medium. Refracted ray gol WOKO ki normal — light yot i light medium.
acholi.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Angle matek ki normal. Energy mapol dwogo cen (Fresnel medde), matidi kato.
acholi.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Snell's Law Inquiry — Refraction, TIR, Dispersion
acholi.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Ket n₁, n₂, incidence angle, ki wavelength. Tam kabedo ma system loko ki refraction o TIR. Pe score, pe reveal.
acholi.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Hypothesis ni (kabedo ma TIR cakke, dok pingo diamond TIR matek loyo glass?)
acholi.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: labolle, diamond tye ki critical angle ~24° ka glass ~42°, mumiyo angle mo matek loyo TIRs...
acholi.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Pingo pe tye critical angle ka icito ki less-dense o more-dense?
acholi.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Ket water→air (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Critical angle en ango? Pingo rec neno lobo ma kigolo i cone malo?
acholi.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: I rainbow, pingo red gol manok loyo blue? Rib ki wavelength slider.
acholi.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Prism poko white light nining ka wavelengths ducu lubo Snell's law marom?
acholi.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Atwero tito pingo n₁/n₂/θ combination man kelo refraction state man.
acholi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — pe score, pe reveal, pe answer dump. Dispersion model tye me nyuto lok (Cauchy-like first-order); dispersion curves me ada gin material-specific (Sellmeier coefficients).
